stemHtml: An IFR flight in VMC experiences radio failure. The pilot believes VMC flight can continue. What should be done?

options.a: Proceed to the destination and report arrival to ATC by the fastest means.
options.b: Continue to the destination unless inaccessible, then report by the quickest means.
options.c: Land at the nearest suitable aerodrome and notify the appropriate ATS unit as quickly as possible.
options.d: Land at the destination and report arrival to the nearest ATS unit.
